summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Phase 6 CaseFlow features: RBAC Permission System, Email Settings, Clear Data Bug Fix, and Demo Login Buttons. All 15 backend API tests passed (100%). All frontend UI tests passed including Permissions tab with role editing, Email tab with SendGrid status, demo login buttons, and role-based navigation restrictions.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/admin/permissions/all - returns 35 permissions and 3 default roles (ADMIN, CASE_WORKER, VOLUNTEER)
Backend: GET /api/admin/roles - returns role list with permission counts
Backend: PUT /api/admin/roles/{role_name} - updates custom permissions for a role
Backend: DELETE /api/admin/roles/{role_name} - resets role to defaults
Backend: GET /api/admin/users/{user_id}/permissions - returns user's effective permissions
Backend: Invalid permission rejected with 400 status
Backend: GET /api/admin/email-settings - returns sendgrid_configured: false (no key set)
Backend: BUG FIX - Seed demo data, clear data, verify caseworker@demo.caseflow.io still logs in
Backend: BUG FIX - Seed demo data, clear data, verify volunteer@demo.caseflow.io still logs in
Backend: Case worker login works and has appropriate permissions (can access clients, denied admin)
Backend: Volunteer login works and has restricted permissions (can read clients, denied admin/reports)
Backend: Dashboard stats endpoint still works
Backend: Clients list endpoint still works
Backend: Notifications endpoint still works
Backend: Messages endpoint still works
Backend: Payment requests endpoint still works
Frontend: Login page shows 3 Quick Demo Login buttons (Admin, Case Worker, Volunteer)
Frontend: Admin demo button pre-fills credentials (admin@caseflow.io / admin123)
Frontend: Case Worker demo button pre-fills credentials (caseworker@demo.caseflow.io / demo1234)
Frontend: Volunteer demo button pre-fills credentials (volunteer@demo.caseflow.io / demo1234)
Frontend: Admin Settings has Permissions tab with Shield icon
Frontend: Admin Settings has Email tab with Mail icon
Frontend: Permissions tab shows 3 role cards (ADMIN: 35 perms, CASE_WORKER: 23 perms, VOLUNTEER: 7 perms)
Frontend: VOLUNTEER role shows (customized) badge when permissions modified
Frontend: Edit Permissions button opens checkbox grid organized by category (admin, ai, clients, demo, follow_ups, messages, outcomes, payments, reports, services, storage, visits)
Frontend: Save and Reset to Default buttons work in permission editor
Frontend: Email tab shows SendGrid Not Configured status with yellow indicator
Frontend: Email tab shows setup instructions (sendgrid.com, SENDGRID_API_KEY, SENDER_EMAIL)
Frontend: Email tab shows 6 email triggers (New Client Created, Visit Scheduled, Payment Request Sent, Payment Received, New Message, Client Onboarded)
Frontend: Demo Mode - Seed Demo Data creates 12 clients with services, outcomes, visits, and payment requests
Frontend: Demo Mode - Clear All Data removes 101 records but preserves demo user accounts
Frontend: BUG FIX VERIFIED - Case Worker can still login after Clear All Data
Frontend: Volunteer sees restricted nav (Dashboard, Clients, Calendar, Payments - NO Reports, Messages, Settings)
Frontend: Case Worker sees nav (Dashboard, Clients, Calendar, Payments, Messages - NO Reports, Settings)
Frontend: Admin sees full nav (Dashboard, Clients, Calendar, Payments, Reports, Messages, Settings)
Frontend: All page navigation works (Dashboard, Clients, Calendar, Payments, Reports, Messages, Settings)
seed_data_creation: Demo data seeded via POST /api/demo/seed - creates 12 clients, services, visits, outcomes, payment requests, and demo user accounts (caseworker, volunteer)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 6 features fully tested and working. RBAC system with 35 granular permissions across 3 roles (ADMIN, CASE_WORKER, VOLUNTEER) with custom editing via checkbox grid. Email notification infrastructure with graceful SendGrid fallback (logs only when no API key). BUG FIXES VERIFIED: 1) Clear All Data no longer deletes demo users (caseworker/volunteer survive clear), 2) Demo login buttons on login page pre-fill credentials. Role-based navigation: Admin sees all 7 nav items, Case Worker sees 5 (no Reports/Settings), Volunteer sees 4 (no Reports/Messages/Settings). All data-testid attributes properly implemented.

mocked_apis.SendGrid: Email sending is MOCKED (no API key configured). Emails are logged but not actually sent. send_email() returns false gracefully.
